scope: v1 contract consumer handoff bundle integrity
summary: V214 adds an integrity guard that cross-checks v1 endpoint pairs, the v208 endpoint catalog snapshot, and the v211 consumer handoff bundle snapshot.
guards: v1 endpoint pair registry contains eight focused v1 contract endpoint/fixture pairs
endpoint catalog and consumer handoff bundle stay adjacent before read-only evidence catalog
bundle catalogedArtifactCount matches the frozen v208 catalog
bundle read targets and fixture targets match the frozen catalog probes
requiredEvidence starts with frozen catalog evidence paths and does not include the bundle self evidence
handoffEvidence includes the bundle self evidence exactly where expected
